validation.username_min: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters

heroSection.title: One workspace for support tickets, role-based actions, and real-time replies.
heroSection.subtitle: MyRelay brings ticket management and per-ticket chat into one product so users, agents, and admins can move through the same system with the permissions each role needs.
heroSection.featureTicketsBody: Track support work from creation to closure with a clear status flow.
heroSection.featureChatBody: Keep every ticket conversation live and attached to the issue it belongs to.
heroSection.featureRolesBody: Expose only the screens and actions each user, agent, or admin should see.
heroSection.workflowSubtitle: The core flow starts with HTTP ticket creation, then continues with live communication and role-based handling inside the same app.

registerPage.title: Create your MyRelay account
registerPage.description: Use the details you plan to keep using across the platform. A clear username and a valid email make onboarding and access management much smoother.
registerPage.guideItem1: Use an email address you can access right away for verification and recovery.
registerPage.guideItem2: Pick a username your team will recognize quickly in shared spaces.
registerPage.guideItem3: Set a password with at least 8 characters and confirm it exactly.
registerPage.guideItem4: Keep these details personal so permissions and activity stay traceable.
registerPage.nextBody: After registration, you can sign in and continue into the workspace and actions available for your role.
